headline: Aptiv Spin Offs Versigent And Reshapes Debt For Focused Growth
summary: Aptiv (NYSE:APTV) completed the spin-off of its Electrical Distribution Systems business into a new independent public company, Versigent. The company also finalized a related cash tender offer for its senior notes as part of the same transaction. This transaction changes Aptiv's business mix and capital structure, with potential implications for shareholders and creditors. Aptiv, a major supplier in the auto technology and mobility space, now separates its traditional Electrical...
